home.intro:
A pixel cabin I built in the cracks of the internet.
A full-stack learner who writes backend APIs and crafts frontend interfaces.
home.name: Alfie
home.mood: Rather than vainly reciting myriad gathas, just have a cup of tea.

about.title: About · ABOUT
about.name: Alfie
about.desc:
A junior CS student at Hefei ****.
Full-stack developer — backend APIs and creative frontend work.
about.tl2023Text: The moment I typed 'Hello, World!' on an old keyboard, the world began to change.
about.tl2024Text: Started systematic Java learning — JavaWeb, databases, and full-stack interaction.
about.tl2025Text: Built Android apps and an e-commerce platform, gaining hands-on experience.
about.tl2026Text: Personal website, study timer, InkSlab writing platform, EasyChat messenger — one by one.

contact.title: Contact · CONTACT
contact.msg1: Maybe one day, when you revisit this page, everything will look completely different.
contact.msg2: But that's okay — iteration is the nature of life.
contact.msg3: Just remember: you once built a tiny pixel room here for yourself. That's enough.

footer.right1: Made with ♥ in a pixel world
